mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Biddle, May 6, 1865
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Major James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Biddle from Richmond, [Virginia], noting that he is starting for Alexandria, Virginia, and that she will not hear from him until then.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2018
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
